name: Fast Chocolate-Pecan Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a square 8x8x2 inch pan with foil and set aside.
2. Melt butter in the microwave on HIGH (full power) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring until smooth.
3. Add cocoa; stir until smooth.
4. Stir in confectioners' sugar and vanilla; blend well (the mixture will be dry and crumbly).
5. Stir in evaporated milk. Microwave on HIGH for 1 minute, stirring, then an additional minute or until the mixture is hot.
6. Beat with a wooden spoon until smooth, then add pecan pieces.
7. Pour into the prepared pan.
8. Store, covered, in the refrigerator. Makes about 4 dozen squares.
